reasoning: The control IR-4 (1) focuses on automated incident handling processes. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that security incidents are detected and alerted upon automatically. This involves enabling audit logging to capture security events, configuring admission controllers to alert on security policy violations, and leveraging service mesh capabilities to detect and alert on anomalous traffic patterns. These functions ensure that Kubernetes environments have automated processes to handle security incidents.
title: Incident Handling | Automated Incident Handling Processes
